description: A pop art-style advertisement depicting a vodka bottle rendered in bold, flat colors. The bottle is shown in a dark silhouette with bright blue and pink outlines against a vivid yellow background. The brand name and text are prominently displayed on the bottle in large letters. Below the bottle image, the text 'ABSOLUT WARHOL.' appears in bold black capital letters on a white background. The style is characteristic of screen printing with simplified forms, high contrast, and saturated commercial colors.
